The '''''Bubkis''''' was an [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] used by the [[Airam (group)|Airam]]. It was present at the [[Asteroid Hangar|Asteroid base]] [[Attila]], during which time the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and Airam Clan leader [[Tamaron]] were exchanging warheads. They were [[Mission to Kuras Drift|attacked]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces assisted by [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wings]] sent by clan leader [[Ilay]]. The attackers were driven off and the base survived along with the ''Bubkis''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
